summary: The U.S. peace deal with Iran remains delicate, but investors seem to be too busy selling artificial intelligence stocks to notice. Iran war peace talks were fraught over the weekend—President Donald Trump threatened to restart the conflict and there was ongoing violence in Lebanon. With Wall Street largely optimistic that an end to hostilities will come sooner rather than later, tech was once again the real reason stocks were moving today.
content: The U.S. peace deal with Iran remains delicate, but investors seem to be too busy selling artificial intelligence stocks to notice. Iran war peace talks were fraught over the weekend—President Donald Trump threatened to restart the conflict and there was ongoing violence in Lebanon. With Wall Street largely optimistic that an end to hostilities will come sooner rather than later, tech was once again the real reason stocks were moving today.
chineseTitle: 回顾与预览：穆迪星期一
chineseSummary: 美国与伊朗的和平协议仍然微妙，但投资者似乎忙于出售人工智能股票而没有注意到。周末的伊朗战争和平谈判充满了争议——唐纳德·特朗普总统威胁要重启冲突，而黎巴嫩的暴力事件仍在持续。由于华尔街普遍乐观地认为敌对行动迟早会结束，科技股再次成为今天股市走势的真正原因。
chineseContent: 美国与伊朗的和平协议仍然微妙，但投资者似乎忙于出售人工智能股票而没有注意到。周末的伊朗战争和平谈判充满了争议——唐纳德·特朗普总统威胁要重启冲突，而黎巴嫩的暴力事件仍在持续。由于华尔街普遍乐观地认为敌对行动迟早会结束，科技股再次成为今天股市走势的真正原因。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
